name: Men's Black Leather Biker Jacket
description: Men's premium black leather biker jacket featuring classic motorcycle details, including an asymmetric zip closure, silver metallic hardware, zippered pockets, and structured notched lapels. Tailored to a regular fit landing at the hip, perfect for bold streetwear looks.

name: Women's Cropped Light Blue Denim Jacket
description: Women's contemporary light blue washed denim jacket in a distinct cropped length. Features buttoned patch pockets at the chest, a standard shirt collar, button-up front closure, and traditional jean jacket seams. Ideal for layering over everyday casual outfits.

name: Men's Olive Green Utility Field Jacket
description: A rugged men's utility field jacket in a rich olive green color. Built from durable heavy canvas material, it boasts four prominent snap-button front pockets, an expandable hidden hood behind a high stand collar, and a dual zip and button closure. Made for outdoors and travel.

name: Unisex Oversized Black Bomber Jacket
description: An on-trend unisex oversized bomber jacket in sleek black polyester. Features standard ribbed knit collar, cuffs, and hem, a heavy front zipper closure, and classic utility flight pockets on the sleeve. Excellent loose fit streetwear piece.

name: Men's Navy Blue Winter Puffer Jacket
description: Men's insulating navy blue puffer jacket designed with clean horizontal quilting. Features a high water-resistant nylon shell, deep zippered hand pockets, an adjustable protective hood, and thick elastic windproof cuffs for ultimate winter warmth.

name: Women's Elegant Cream Tailored Blazer
description: Women's professional and chic cream-colored blazer featuring sharp notched lapels and a single-breasted button front closure. Its tailored structure provides a flattering silhouette, while clean flap pockets add functionality for office or formal styling.

name: Unisex Classic Navy Blue Varsity Jacket
description: A vintage-inspired unisex varsity letterman jacket showcasing a classic color-blocked design with a navy blue wool body and contrasting white leather sleeves. Accented with striped ribbed cuffs and collar, snap-button closure, and slanted welt pockets.

name: Women's Khaki Long Belted Trench Coat
description: Women's classic double-breasted trench coat in traditional khaki cotton twill. Features prominent storm flaps, wide lapel collar, matching adjustable waist belt, and deep side pockets. A long-length luxury piece perfect for elegant autumn travel and layering.

name: Men's Red Waterproof Performance Rain Jacket
description: Men's bright red high-performance rain jacket engineered for intense outdoor activities. Built from fully waterproof polyester with taped zippers, an adjustable toggle hood, windproof Velcro cuffs, and a black contrast lining. Ideal for hiking and rain protection.

name: Unisex Charcoal Grey Fleece Zip Jacket
description: A soft and cozy unisex full-zip jacket made from thick charcoal grey fleece fabric. Features an insulating mock stand collar, contrasting black trim, and secure zippered side pockets. Designed as a comfortable mid-layer for everyday athleisure and cold weather.

name: Men's Distressed Black Denim Trucker Jacket
description: Men's rugged faded black denim trucker jacket styled with a modern boxy silhouette. Accented with subtle distressed detailing, dual button-flap chest pockets, side slit pockets, a standard shirt collar, and antique metallic silver buttons.

name: Women's Olive Green Lightweight Windbreaker
description: Women's sporty and lightweight windbreaker jacket in an earthy olive green shade. Crafted from crisp nylon with a relaxed fit, features a full zipper front, protective hood, drawstring hem adjustment, and elasticated cuffs to keep out drafts.

name: Men's Dark Brown Suede Leather Jacket
description: A luxurious men's jacket tailored from fine dark brown genuine suede leather. Features a clean minimalist profile, classic shirt collar, metallic zip front, and smooth welt waist pockets. An exceptional choice for smart casual autumn outfits.

name: Women's Cropped Black Puffer Jacket
description: Women's stylish cropped puffer jacket in solid black, featuring dramatic high-loft quilted panels. Built with an insulating high stand collar, a heavy-duty hidden front zipper, and elastic wrists. Ideal for streetwear winter looks.

name: Men's Herringbone Tweed Blazer
description: A classic men's smart casual blazer tailored from heavy grey and black herringbone tweed wool fabric. Outfitted with classic notched lapels, a two-button front layout, structured shoulders, and traditional front flap pockets.

name: Women's Pastel Pink Corduroy Jacket
description: Women's charming casual jacket constructed from soft pastel pink ribbed corduroy fabric. Styled in a comfortable relaxed fit, it highlights a silver button-up front, classic shirt collar, and patch chest pockets for a cute collegiate look.

name: Men's Red Checked Flannel Hooded Jacket
description: Men's casual relaxed-fit shirt-jacket in a striking red and black checked plaid pattern. Crafted from soft cotton flannel, it features an integrated grey knit drawstring hood, dual chest pockets, and button closures, perfect for layering.

name: Women's Long Quilted Down Parka
description: Women's premium heavy winter parka featuring knee-length coverage and uniform quilted down insulation. Outfitted with a high-zippered neck, a cozy fleece-lined hood, hidden storm cuffs, and zippered side pockets for maximal cold protection.

name: Men's White Minimalist Windbreaker
description: Men's crisp pure white windbreaker jacket crafted in a sleek minimalist aesthetic. Features a lightweight weather-resistant polyester shell, a clean zip front, comfortable elastic cuffs, and a practical stand collar with an internal stowaway hood.

name: Women's Burgundy Faux Leather Biker Jacket
description: Women's striking slim fit biker jacket in deep burgundy faux leather. Embellished with asymmetrical silver zip tracks, hardware snap accents on the notched lapel collar, and zippered cuffs. Designed to fit close to the body at a slightly cropped length for edgy evening or party styles.

name: Black Relaxed Fit Cargo Utility Pants
description: These black relaxed fit cargo utility pants feature a solid mid rise waist and straight leg fit. Crafted from durable cotton cargo twill, they are equipped with multiple functional cargo pockets and a zip fly closure for outdoor or streetwear looks.

name: Blue Washed Slim Fit Denim Jeans
description: A pair of men's blue washed slim fit denim jeans featuring a practical mid rise cut and tight skinny leg fit. Styled with typical denim side pockets and a secure zip fly, ideal for classic everyday casual wear.

name: Beige Regular Fit Smart Chinos
description: These elegant beige regular fit chinos present a timeless solid aesthetic, ideal for both professional office and casual travel settings. Features a comfortable mid rise waist, straight leg fit, slash side pockets, and zip fly.

name: Olive Green Tapered Fit Joggers
description: Comfortable olive green joggers styled in a tapered fit that lands at an ankle length silhouette. Designed with a flexible mid rise elastic waist, drawstring closure, and functional side pockets for active gym or casual loungewear.

name: Women's High Waist Wide Leg Jeans
description: Showcasing a retro aesthetic, these women's high waist denim jeans offer a dramatic wide leg fit. The light blue washed denim construction features classic side and back pockets with a traditional top button closure.

name: Grey Checkered Slim Fit Trousers
description: A sophisticated addition to corporate fashion, these men's office trousers boast a refined grey checked pattern. Engineered in a modern slim fit with a mid rise waist, straight leg profile, slash pockets, and a buttoned zip fly closure.

name: Black Straight Fit Casual Chinos
description: Minimalist men's black trousers tailored from crisp solid cotton fabric. With an adaptable mid rise waist and a straight leg fit, these casual chinos offer clean lines, standard side pockets, and a secure zip fly setup.

name: Blue Ripped Distressed Denim Jeans
description: Infuse an edgy streetwear look with these blue washed denim jeans showcasing visible ripped distressed details. Styled in a comfortable relaxed fit with a mid rise waist and a straight leg cut finished with a classic button closure.

name: Navy Blue Tailored Formal Pants
description: Essential dress trousers for formal office spaces, these solid navy blue pants offer a structured regular fit. Designed with flat front slash pockets, a tidy mid rise waistline, straight leg draping, and a buttoned zip fly.

name: Women's Skinny High Waist Denim Jeans
description: Accentuate the silhouette with these women's high waist denim jeans tailored in a tight skinny fit. Crafted from deep solid dark blue stretch denim, it incorporates clean side pockets and a classic button and zip fly closure.

name: Khaki Twill Relaxed Fit Cargo Trousers
description: These khaki twill relaxed fit cargo trousers provide maximum utility with deep functional side cargo pockets. Formed with an adaptable mid rise waist and a slight tapered leg profile, they utilize robust zip fly closures for travel and outdoor wear.

name: Charcoal Grey Pleated Formal Pants
description: Refined charcoal grey regular fit trousers showing smart front pleats for a traditional formal aesthetic. Offers comfortable mid rise seating, a clean straight leg silhouette, elegant slash pockets, and a classic zip fly.

name: Women's Black Straight Fit Ankle Trousers
description: A chic wardrobe foundation piece, these women's black straight fit ankle trousers combine a flattering high waist design with a crisp ankle length hem. Features clean minimal lines, slash pockets, and a zip fly closure for easy office wear.

name: Camouflage Print Cotton Cargo Pants
description: Embodying a bold utility streetwear edge, these loose fit cargo pants present a classic green and brown camouflage pattern. Designed with practical expanding cargo leg pockets, a mid rise waist, straight leg cut, and a heavy zip fly.

name: Women's High Waist Skinny Black Jeans
description: Sleek and versatile, these women's high waist jeans boast an ultra-sleek skinny fit profile. Rendered in clean solid black stretch denim with functional side pockets and a sharp zip fly closure, built for everyday use.

name: Men's Dark Green Casual Chinos
description: These distinctive dark green men's casual chinos offer a sharp slim fit outline. Formed out of rich solid cotton fabric with clean side pockets, a versatile mid rise waist, a straight lower leg drape, and a standard zip fly.

name: White Summer Wide Leg Linen Pants
description: The ideal piece for hot weather, these white summer linen pants provide a breezy wide leg fit. Outfitted with a high waist flexible elastic waist band, casual side pockets, and a fluid silhouette tailored for beach travel.

name: Men's Tan Brown Slim Chino Trousers
description: Crafted from fine solid cotton, these men's office trousers in a warm tan brown tone are cut into a polished slim fit. Features functional side patch pockets, an everyday mid rise structure, straight legs, and a zip fly.

name: Black Sporty Drawstring Casual Joggers
description: Offering ultimate lounging ease, these black relaxed fit joggers present a deep solid tone. The sporty build utilizes a mid rise elastic waist with adjustable drawstrings, casual side pockets, and tapered ankles for unisex everyday active use.

name: Burgundy Red Slim Fit Trousers
description: Make a sophisticated statement with these rich burgundy red slim fit trousers. Woven from a smooth cotton blend fabric, they include functional side pockets, a structured mid rise waist, straight leg alignment, and a standard zip fly.

name: Women's Light Blue Distressed Boyfriend Jeans
description: These relaxed women's light blue jeans feature a trendy loose fit boyfriend cut with washed denim accents. Finished with strategically placed distressed frayed slashes, traditional side denim pockets, and an authentic button front waist closure.

name: Dark Grey Tailored Wool Blend Trousers
description: Perfect for colder seasons, these men's office trousers showcase a dark grey structured appearance. Formed into a classic regular fit with an accommodating mid rise waist, straight leg drop, sharp side slash pockets, and a clean zip fly.

name: Men's Classic White Long Sleeve Dress Shirt
description: A classic men's white formal shirt featuring a smooth cotton texture, long sleeves, and a sharp spread collar. Perfect for professional office wear and formal events with its clean button up closure and regular fit silhouette.

name: Men's Navy Blue Crisp Button Down Shirt
description: A sophisticated navy blue long sleeve shirt designed for smart casual or business casual environments. Made from smooth cotton, it features a structured button down collar and a clean button up placket.

name: Men's Light Blue Patterned Casual Shirt
description: A casual light blue long sleeve shirt adorned with a subtle micro-print pattern. The regular fit style features a classic point collar and button up front, ideal for everyday casual wear.

name: Men's Gingham Checked Long Sleeve Shirt
description: A versatile long sleeve shirt showcasing a blue and white gingham checked pattern. Features a functional single chest pocket, a polished button down collar, and a reliable button up front.

name: Men's White Short Sleeve Summer Linen Shirt
description: A breezy and lightweight short sleeve summer shirt crafted from white linen fabric. Styled in a relaxed fit with a classic point collar and button up front, perfect for warm weather or beach vacations.

name: Men's Black Cotton Formal Shirt
description: A sleek and modern slim fit black shirt made from high-quality smooth cotton. Features an elegant spread collar, long sleeves, and a clean button up closure for a polished evening or formal look.

name: Women's Floral Print Long Sleeve Chiffon Shirt
description: A beautiful women's floral shirt made from lightweight, fluid chiffon fabric. The romantic multi-colored floral print is paired with a point collar, long sleeves, and an easy button up design.

name: Men's Red Plaid Flannel Shirt
description: A classic streetwear staple, this men's long sleeve checked shirt features a vibrant red and black plaid pattern. Crafted from warm brushed flannel with double chest pockets and a cozy relaxed fit.

name: Women's Silk Striped Office Shirt
description: Elevate your workwear with this elegant women's office shirt crafted from silky smooth fabric. Features timeless black vertical stripes on a white backdrop, an alluring v-neckline, long sleeves, and a button up front.

name: Men's Khaki Military Style Utility Shirt
description: A rugged military-inspired men's casual shirt in plain khaki color. Made from durable cotton twill texture, featuring functional double buttoned chest pockets, long sleeves, and a classic button up closure.

name: Unisex Oversized Beige Corduroy Shirt
description: An on-trend unisex oversized shirt featuring a warm beige color and tactile ribbed corduroy material. Designed with long sleeves, a single chest pocket, and a roomy oversized fit ideal for layering as a shacket.

name: Men's Denim Blue Button Up Shirt
description: A classic men's blue shirt rendered in durable denim fabric. The casual style highlights a standard button up design, a single patch pocket at the chest, long sleeves, and timeless curved hems.

name: Women's Cropped White Short Sleeve Shirt
description: A stylish streetwear-inspired white shirt for women featuring a modern cropped length. Offers a relaxed fit silhouette with short sleeves, a classic point collar, and a convenient button up front.

name: Men's Olive Green Mandarin Collar Shirt
description: A contemporary slim fit blue shirt variant in rich olive green, featuring a distinguished mandarin collar. Crafted from a breathable summer shirt linen blend, complete with long sleeves and button up front.

name: Women's Satin Emerald Green Party Shirt
description: Make a statement at night events with this women's party shirt in gleaming emerald green. Tailored in a flattering slim fit, it features long sleeves, a polished spread collar, and a sleek button up front.

name: Men's Burgundy Oxford Casual Shirt
description: A classic men's office shirt alternative in deep burgundy maroon color. This regular fit oxford shirt boasts long sleeves, a clean button down collar, a single chest pocket, and a smart casual silhouette.

name: Women's Polka Dot Short Sleeve Shirt
description: A playful women's casual shirt featuring a timeless black and white polka dot pattern. Designed for sunny days with short sleeves, a classic point collar, and an easy-to-wear button up closure.

name: Men's Grey Chambray Work Shirt
description: Durable and practical, this men's long sleeve checked shirt alternative features a solid grey chambray fabric. Includes double buttoned utility chest pockets, a point collar, and a rugged button up layout.

name: Women's Oversized Linen Stripe Shirt
description: The ultimate breathable summer shirt, this women's oversized linen shirt showcases breezy blue and white vertical stripes. Features an oversized longline fit, long sleeves, and a handy single chest pocket.

name: Men's Pink Slim Fit Smart Shirt
description: Add color to your wardrobe with this slim fit blue shirt companion in fresh pastel pink. Tailored close to the body with long sleeves, a crisp spread collar, and button up front, ideal for weddings or office wear.

name: Men's Navy Blue Floral Holiday Shirt
description: A vibrant mens office shirt alternative perfect for holidays, this short sleeve navy blue floral shirt features a bold tropical print. Built with a relaxed fit, a casual camp collar, and smooth lightweight material.

name: Women's Denim Long Sleeve Western Shirt
description: A classic western-style women's denim shirt in medium blue wash. Features distinct double pointed button chest pockets, long sleeves with button cuffs, and a strong cotton denim fabrication.

name: Men's White Grandad Collar Cotton Shirt
description: A minimalist white cotton shirt for men featuring a modern grandad or mandarin collar. With its breathable summer shirt properties, regular fit, and long sleeves, it bridges the gap between smart and casual.

name: Men's Tartan Checked Flannel Shirt
description: Stay comfortable in this long sleeve checked shirt featuring a classic green and navy blue tartan plaid pattern. Crafted from heavily brushed cozy flannel with a single pocket and casual relaxed fit.
